title: Bridge Essay: The Fundamental Basis of Palpitations: A Neurocardiology Approach.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.

**The Fundamental Basis of Palpitations: A Neurocardiology Approach.**. Curr Cardiol Rev.. PMID: 34503434. DOI: 10.2174/1573403X17666210909123930. BACKGROUND AND OBJECTIVE: Palpitations are acommon symptom that may indicate cardiac arrhythmias, be asomatic complaint in anxiety disorders, and can be present in patients without either condition. The objective of this review was to explore the pathways and fundamental mechanisms through which individuals appreciate palpitations. OBSERVATIONS: Cardiac afferents provide beat-to-beat sensory information on the heart to the spinal cord, brain stem, and higher brain centers. Cardioception, asub
